## Dataset identity

- Dataset name:
- Version:
- Official URL or DOI:
- License:
- Access constraints:

## Clinical and acquisition context

- Setting: hospital / home / mixed / unknown
- Sensor modalities:
- Sampling rates:
- Placement:
- Synchronization evidence:
- Calibration evidence:

## Labels

- Label source: neurologist / expert adjudication / clinical record / proxy / self-report / automatic
- Onset available: yes / no
- Offset available: yes / no
- Estimated temporal uncertainty:
- Label audit status:

## Population

- Number of patients:
- Number of seizures:
- Monitoring duration:
- Age/sex summary if available:
- Seizure types, preferably ILAE vocabulary:

## Proposed EpiBench use

- Track: D / W / F / E
- Proposed tier: T1 / T2 / T3
- Proposed split policies:
- Known limitations:
- Known missingness/artifacts:

## SOTA relationship

- Existing benchmark or scoring framework already used:
- Relationship: ADOPT / MAP / EXTEND / DIVERGE
- Rationale if EXTEND or DIVERGE:

## Evidence package readiness

- [ ] Dataset Evidence Card draft
- [ ] Raw-to-processed trace
- [ ] Split manifest
- [ ] Label audit note
- [ ] Baseline plan
- [ ] Known failure modes
